description: A young female adventurer at the beginning of her heroic journey, confident, fearless, and naturally charismatic, with a cool slightly rebellious presence. She has sharp expressive eyes, windswept dark brown hair, and a lean athletic build. Her stance should feel relaxed but ready, showing courage, independence, and hidden heroic potential without making her look like an experienced warrior yet. She wears a practical fantasy adventurer outfit: a fitted deep blue-green tunic, a cropped weathered leather jacket or asymmetrical shoulder guard, a utility belt, dark fitted trousers, fingerless gloves, and sturdy travel boots. Add a small sword or dagger at her side, but avoid dresses, excessive armor, royal clothing, farming clothes, overly cute details, sexualized clothing, or a generic medieval peasant appearance. The character should look cool, memorable, capable, and slightly mysterious — someone destined to become a legendary hero, but still early in her story. Beautiful without looking like a princess, youthful without looking childish, heroic without looking like an established knight. High-quality RPG pixel-art character, clean readable silhouette, strong shape language, expressive face, detailed but controlled pixel work, cohesive fantasy color palette, full-body character, single centered figure, transparent background.
